identity.name: Zain
identity.tagline: Founder of Leaf Studios. I build high performance Minecraft plugins from economy systems to custom game engines. Java, Spigot, Paper, Folia.

about.comment: Passionate about writing clean, performant Java. Every plugin ships with proper config, full docs and real support.

mainProject.title: Leaf Studios
mainProject.label: leaf_studios | main project
mainProject.description: Premium plugin development studio. Every plugin ships with modern GUI systems, deep config, PlaceholderAPI support, and active maintenance. Used across 100+ servers worldwide.

projects.name: DonutDuels
projects.summary: Built a complete 1v1 duels plugin with kit editor, arena rotation, party system, and ELO ranking. Modern GUI flow and full PlaceholderAPI support.

review.text: Insane quality. The plugin runs flawlessly across our network and Zain handled every request fast.

projects.name: BlockyDonations
projects.summary: Tebex-integrated donation menu plugin with package previews, dynamic pricing, and animated GUIs. Used on 50+ servers.

review.text: Made our donation conversions go up massively. Clean code, clean UI. 10/10.

projects.name: LeafHomes
projects.summary: Modern /home plugin with per-rank limits, async teleports, custom GUIs, and full Folia support. Drop-in replacement for EssentialsX homes.

review.text: Finally a homes plugin that actually works on Folia. Performance is excellent.

projects.name: TownyDiscord
projects.summary: Custom Towny ↔ Discord bridge with town channels, role syncing, and live town stats embedded into the Discord server.

review.text: Exactly what we needed. Zain understood the brief immediately and shipped early.

commissions.intro: I also build commissioned plugins, server setups, and websites. Reach out on Discord with your brief.

items.title: Commission Plugins
items.desc: Private and public plugins built for creators, minigames, and network systems.

items.title: Servers Worked On
items.desc: Setup, balancing, optimization, and long term maintenance for live servers.

items.title: Web Projects
items.desc: Websites, docs portals, and frontend work supporting plugin or server brands.

contact.intro: Need a custom plugin? Custom server setup? Let's talk. Hit me on Discord for the fastest reply, or check out the store on BuiltByBit.
